# Networking & Content Delivery Icons

## Networking & CDN (`#8C4FFF`)

### resourceIcon (service-level)

Use pattern: `shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.<resIcon>`
Required: `fillColor=#8C4FFF;strokeColor=#ffffff`

| Display Name | resIcon |
|---|---|
| Networking and Content Delivery | `networking_and_content_delivery` |
| API Gateway | `api_gateway` |
| App Mesh | `app_mesh` |
| Client VPN | `client_vpn` |
| Cloud Directory | `cloud_directory` |
| Cloud Map | `cloud_map` |
| Cloud WAN | `cloud_wan` |
| CloudFront | `cloudfront` |
| Direct Connect | `direct_connect` |
| Elastic Load Balancing | `elastic_load_balancing` |
| Global Accelerator | `global_accelerator` |
| Private 5G | `private_5g` |
| PrivateLink | `vpc_privatelink` |
| Route 53 | `route_53` |
| Site-to-Site VPN | `site_to_site_vpn` |
| Transit Gateway | `transit_gateway` |
| Verified Access | `verified_access` |
| VPC | `vpc` |
| VPC Lattice | `vpc_lattice` |
| Application Recovery Controller | `application_recovery_controller` |

### Dedicated shapes (resource-level)

Use pattern: `shape=mxgraph.aws4.<shape>`
Required: `fillColor=#8C4FFF;strokeColor=none`

| Display Name | shape |
|---|---|
| Application Load Balancer | `application_load_balancer` |
| Classic Load Balancer | `classic_load_balancer` |
| Gateway Load Balancer | `gateway_load_balancer` |
| Network Load Balancer | `network_load_balancer` |
| Endpoint | `endpoint` |
| Endpoints | `endpoints` |
| Internet Gateway | `internet_gateway` |
| NAT Gateway | `nat_gateway` |
| VPN Gateway | `vpn_gateway` |
| VPN Connection | `vpn_connection` |
| Customer Gateway | `customer_gateway` |
| Router | `router` |
| Gateway | `gateway` |
| Download Distribution | `download_distribution` |
| CloudFront Functions | `cloudfront_functions` |
| Edge Location | `edge_location` |
| Streaming Distribution | `streaming_distribution` |
| Hosted Zone | `hosted_zone` |
| Route Table | `route_table` |
| Route 53 Resolver | `route_53_resolver` |
| Route 53 Resolver DNS Firewall | `route_53_resolver_dns_firewall` |
| Elastic Network Adapter | `elastic_network_adapter` |
| Elastic Network Interface | `elastic_network_interface` |
| Flow Logs | `flow_logs` |
| Network Access Control List | `network_access_control_list` |
| Peering Connection | `peering` |
| Transit Gateway Attachment | `transit_gateway_attachment` |
| VPC Carrier Gateway | `vpc_carrier_gateway` |
| Traffic Mirroring | `vpc_traffic_mirroring` |
| VPC | `vpc_virtual_private_cloud_vpc` |
| Virtual Gateway | `virtual_gateway` |
| Virtual Node | `virtual_node` |
| Virtual Router | `virtual_router` |
| Virtual Service | `virtual_service` |
| Cloud WAN Segment Network | `cloud_wan_segment_network` |
| Cloud WAN Core Network Edge | `cloud_wan_virtual_pop` |
